component.name: Rclone Remotes
Remotos Rclone
component.summary: Configura almacenamiento en la nube para Dolphin

description.p: KIO Rclone browses the remotes already configured in rclone from Dolphin and every other KIO-aware application, exposing them as a normal-looking rclone:/ location. It deliberately does not depend on KDE Online Accounts or LibKGAPI: rclone owns OAuth, provider APIs, retries and the user's credentials.

KIO Rclone permite navegar, desde Dolphin y cualquier otra aplicación compatible con KIO, los remotos ya configurados en rclone, exponiéndolos como una ubicación rclone:/ normal. Deliberadamente no depende de Cuentas en línea de KDE ni de LibKGAPI: rclone es quien maneja OAuth, las APIs de cada proveedor, los reintentos y las credenciales del usuario.

This configuration utility manages rclone remotes: add Google Drive, reconnect an expired session, or set up a private Google OAuth client to avoid rclone's shared, quota-limited client. Credentials and OAuth tokens are always stored by rclone itself and are never copied into KIO Rclone.

Esta utilidad de configuración administra remotos de rclone: agregar Google Drive, reconectar una sesión vencida, o configurar un cliente OAuth de Google privado para evitar el cliente compartido y limitado en cuota de rclone. Las credenciales y los tokens OAuth siempre quedan guardados por rclone mismo, nunca se copian a KIO Rclone.
Supported operations once a remote is configured:
Operaciones disponibles una vez configurado un remoto:

ul.li: Download and upload through Dolphin, with live progress
Descargar y subir archivos desde Dolphin, con progreso en vivo
Create, rename and delete files and directories
Crear, renombrar y eliminar archivos y carpetas
Open and edit ordinary documents through KIOFuse
Abrir y editar documentos comunes a través de KIOFuse
Pause and cancel transfers through normal KIO backpressure
Pausar y cancelar transferencias con la contrapresión normal de KIO

description.p: Remotes in rclone:/ now show a themed icon for Google Drive, Dropbox and OneDrive instead of a generic folder. The configuration window's description and empty-state hint were reworded.

The "Configure Remotes…" entry is now a shortcut to the installed launcher instead of a folder the file worker opened by launching the application itself. Listing rclone:/ no longer starts any window, so recursive scans cannot trigger it, and a single window is guaranteed by the application's own single-instance registration.

Adds OneDrive and Dropbox to the guided Add Remote flow, an Edit dialog for renaming remotes and changing their OAuth client, support for encrypted rclone configurations, and a Spanish translation of the whole interface.
Fixes the configuration window opening unbounded duplicate copies of itself when its KIO entry is listed repeatedly. It now enforces a single running instance and raises the existing window instead.

Fixes safe, atomic remote file transfers: uploads publish only after the full transfer succeeds, duplicate remote names resolve to one deterministic entry, and Google-native document exports report their real size before opening.
Adds live rclone upload progress, streams only the requested remote file during downloads, and adds private Google OAuth client configuration.
